//: Test-target registry — keyed by REPO NAME (the stable, unique id). Copy to targets.json (gitignored) and fill in YOUR local checkout paths. Add a line per repo as the org grows (a 4th Angular app, a 2nd Flutter app, another cloud-function — no var collisions, just another entry). The hub resolves a run's targets by name. `port` (angular only) lets multiple web apps serve concurrently in one cross-project run.
